name: Butterfield Crossing Park
description: Come play pickleball at Butterfield Crossing Park in Castle Rock, CO! There are 6 outdoor hard courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. Amenities include restrooms, water, and lights. The courts are free. You can reserve the courts.

name: Centennial 24 Hr Fitness
description: Centennial 24 Hr Fitness is a place to play pickleball in Highlands Ranch, CO. There are 3 indoor wood courts. The lines are permanent, but you'll need to bring your own net. A membership is required to play.

name: Cobblestone Ranch Park
description: Come play pickleball at Cobblestone Ranch Park in Castle Rock, CO! There are 6 outdoor acrylic courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. The facility includes amenities like restrooms. The courts are free.

name: Coyote Ridge Park
description: Coyote Ridge Park is a place to play pickleball in Castle Pines, CO. There are 5 outdoor asphalt courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. The courts are free. Players have access to restrooms. The courts cannot be reserved.
open_play_schedule: Courts are NOT reservable or rentable.  This is strictly an OPEN PLAY court

name: Crowfoot Valley Big Park

description: Deputy Zack S. Parrish Memorial Park is a place to play pickleball in Castle Rock, CO. There are 6 outdoor hard courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. You can’t reserve the courts. Amenities include restrooms. The courts are free.

name: Epic Pickleball Club

Players have access to food, a pro shop or equipment store, restrooms, trainers or lessons, youth programming, and water. You can reserve the courts.

name: Foster Court

name: Founders Park

name: Highlands Ranch South Ridge
description: Highlands Ranch South Ridge is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Highlands Ranch, CO. There are 3 indoor hard courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. A membership is required to play. The facility includes amenities like food, restrooms, water, and locker rooms. You can reserve the courts.

name: Highlands Ranch - Tanks Park
description: Highlands Ranch - Tanks Park is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Highlands Ranch, CO. There are 4 outdoor concrete courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. The courts are free. Amenities include restrooms.

name: Life Time - Parker-Aurora
description: Life Time - Parker-Aurora is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Parker, CO. There are 9 indoor hard courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. The facility includes amenities like restrooms, locker rooms, water, food, a pro shop or equipment store, lights, trainers or lessons, and wheelchair accessibility. Reservations are available. A membership is required to play.

name: Lone Tree Recreation Center
description:
Come check out our new outdoor pickleball courts at Lone Tree Recreation Center! The six outdoor courts are located at the southeast corner of the parking lot of the facility. The pickleball courts feature:

- 6 outdoor courts with permanent nets
- Open 8 am-9 pm, seven days a week
- Push-button operated lighting at night (year-round)
- Shade pavilion with seating and tables
- There is a port-o-let available at Prairie Sky Park
- Rainout Line link for weather related court issues and closures
fees: Fee required — Recreation center admission covers cost of indoor drop-in play.

name: Palomino Park
description: Palomino Park is a place to play pickleball in Highlands Ranch, CO. There are 6 hard courts. 2 are indoors and 4 are outdoors. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. The courts are private.
